CustomField.formula: Personel_Salaries_and_Wages__c + Payroll_Taxes_and_Fringe_Benefits__c + RentLeaseMortgage__c + Utilities__c + Telephone__c + Office_Supplies__c + Postage__c + Printing_and_Copying__c + Travel__c + Insurance__c + Consultant_and_Contract_Services__c + Legal__c + Accounting__c + in_Kind_Expenses__c + Other_Expenses__c + Other_1_Expense__c + Other_2_Expense__c
CustomField.label: Total Expenses
